title: UltimaCraft Leaf
description: Add-on for UltimaCraft, which adds bushy leaves and falling leaves animation
body:
![UltimaCraft Leaf poster](https://i.ibb.co/LhNgTtD/leaf-poster.jpg)

# UltimaCraft Leaf

**UltimaCraft Leaf** - is an add-on for **[UltimaCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ultimacraft-main)**, which adds bushy leaves and falling leaves animation.

## Features

- new models for leaves blocks
- leaves falling animations (not for all types)
- new leaves shades color

## Mod support
- **[Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)**

---

© You can use UltimaCraft Leaf publicly, but you can not claim it as your property.
